questionHtml: Describe the mechanism by which the heartbeat is initiated.
markschemeHtml:
a. sinoatrial node/SAN initiates contraction of atria;

b. SAN sends messages to the atrioventricular/AV node;

c. AV node initiates ventricular contraction;

d. through conducting fibres;

meta.title: Describe the mechanism by which the heartbeat is initiated.
breadcrumbLabels: B3.2.16. Stages in the cardiac cycle
